Excellent service on the beach, new facilities in impeccable condition. Very busy during the day.

reviews.comment:
Excelentes los capuccinos  de Vane!
Merece un premio a los mejores de VLA, un arte como los prepara

(Translated by Google)
Vane's cappuccinos are excellent!
She deserves an award for best cappuccino at VLA; the way she makes them is an art.

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno todo, lo único en contra es que no hay suficiente lugar para estacionar oara hacer compras en el shop, respetan protocolo covid 19.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, the only downside is that there isn't enough parking to do shopping in the store; they respect the COVID-19 protocol.
